name: Polecat
description: Library component. The single Polecat archetype: a Claude Code session running with the polecat role. Models BOTH the work-coordination lifecycle (Absent -> Working -> Done -> Idle) AND the substrate-layer hook-receive boundary (HOOK_IN port). Different applications bind different subsets of ports: convoy-lands bindings exercise MERGE_READY/ISSUE_OBSERVE; polecat-receives-hook bindings exercise HOOK_IN. Both paths to Working exist (option C): SLING-receive AND observe-driven.

SLING.description: receives a sling assignment from Feeder.

MERGE_READY.description: signals the refinery that work is complete (done.go:1170 nudgeRefinery). Tagged 'MergeReady'.

HOOK_IN.description: receives a Claude Code session lifecycle event (PreCompact, etc.).

actors.name: Polecat
actors.owner: Polecat agent. Option C: both SLING-receive and observe-driven paths to Working.

triples.event: polecat advances by observing its assigned issue is hooked (observe-driven path)
hook handler completes; headless polecat returns to working
